modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to label or classify documents for protection

full_description_text:  
I am trying to label or set the classification on a file to protect it. I work in the office and use Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. I need this for both internal and external users, but I'm not sure how to do it.
